title: Recognition Model Comparison
description: Comparison of baseline TCN-attention recognition model and phase-aware TCN-attention recognition model on the test set.

title: Phase-Aware Improvement
description: Absolute test-set improvement of the phase-aware model over the no-phase baseline.

title: Paired Prediction Comparison
description: Paired test-set comparison showing which samples were correct under both models, only the phase-aware model, only the baseline, or neither.

title: Per-Class F1 Delta
description: Classes most improved and most hurt by adding ordered phase one-hot features.

title: Attention Mass by Phase
description: Average attention mass assigned by the recognition model to background, preparation, stroke, and retraction regions.

title: Final Pipeline Summary
description: Combined summary of the Phase Detection TCN and final recognition models.
